title: JustCall Native Phone App integration

posts.author: GulfAdmin (Brian Mead)
posts.cookedHtml:
Requesting an integration with Justcall telephony app
which will allow the native dialer to be integrated inside of Monday
This will allow for true phone logging, Sms And automation and also access to AI Chatbot which is already built into the native Dialer

This will replace the current Format which places an icon next to the phone numbers
Which can slow down the loading off your website as each phone number has to wait until there’s an icon placed next to it

Thanks!
